name: travelers-inn
description: Travelers Inn — Booking & Reservation Management System

scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema booking > src/types/database.types.ts
scripts.db:types:linked: supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema booking > src/types/database.types.ts
scripts.test:db: node supabase/tests/invite-claim.test.mjs && node supabase/tests/rooms.test.mjs && node supabase/tests/bookings.test.mjs && node supabase/tests/front-desk.test.mjs && node supabase/tests/portal.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types supabase/tests/reports.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types supabase/tests/pricing.test.ts
